name: Plist Preflight
short_description: Audit macOS app Info.plist and entitlement metadata before build, CI, or release changes.
audience: Codex agents working on local macOS app workspaces
Reviewers checking metadata before project or signing edits
detail_lines: Finds malformed plists, placeholder bundle IDs, missing versions, and missing core app metadata.
Checks menu-bar activation hints and common privacy usage strings without touching project files.
Supports markdown output and configurable fail severity for PR or CI preflight runs.
Keeps entitlement findings explicit so signing-sensitive changes stay deliberate.
